section_name: Applicability of this part to heavy-duty diesel fleets of nine or more
text: Diesel-powered motor vehicles subject to the provisions of section 42-4-414 shall not be subject to the diesel emissions inspection program set forth in this part 4 unless the conditions set forth in section 42-4-414 (3)(c) have been met.
markdown:
## Title 42
#### Article 4. Regul. of Vehicles & Traffic
##### § 42-4-411 — Applicability of this part to heavy-duty diesel fleets of nine or more

Diesel-powered motor vehicles subject to the provisions of section 42-4-414 shall not be subject to the diesel emissions inspection program set forth in this part 4 unless the conditions set forth in section 42-4-414 (3)(c) have been met.

subsections.text: Diesel-powered motor vehicles subject to the provisions of section 42-4-414 shall not be subject to the diesel emissions inspection program set forth in this part 4 unless the conditions set forth in section 42-4-414 (3)(c) have been met.
